title: triticum durum var. hordeiforme
intro: Triticum durum var. hordeiforme is a type of emmer wheat, a ancient grain that belongs to the wheat family and is known for its high nutritional value and medicinal properties. The medicinal properties of emmer wheat include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, reduce inflammation, and aid in digestion, making it a popular choice among herbalists and natural health practitioners. The health benefits of consuming emmer wheat include improved heart health, reduced risk of chronic diseases, and enhanced cognitive function. Emmer wheat can be prepared as an herbal tea by steeping the grains in hot water, or used as an ingredient in bread and pasta recipes to take advantage of its nutritional and medicinal benefits.
